case_title: JASMINDER BANGA VS. NITIN SHAH et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANGA, JASMINDER AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, NITIN AN INDIVIDUAL QUIST, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL BECKER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-13-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-29-2011
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BALSAM, DANIEL L. AS ATTORNEY FOR BANGA, JASMINDER AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-13-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-24-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-24-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-16-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST JASMINDER BANGA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-16-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-01-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-18-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
